comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Evaluating English-language log datasets for demo quality. Sampling candidate corpora (BGL, Thunderbird, OpenStack-style) to pick one with human-readable content and practical subset size for reproducible CLI demos.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Switched demo suitability toward English-language logs by adding BGL support to the dataset export script and making output concise for demos. Added source-aware grouping in collector, aggregate top blip formatting in analyzer output, and README examples centered on BGL. Verified with pytest (6 passed) and behave (4 scenarios passed).
